programme.desc: Immigration investigates what a New Zealander is hiding two Cubans create a biological crisis something is hidden inside a parcel.

programme.desc: A family looks as if they're using their children to smuggle drugs fake designer labels container arrives from Hong Kong.

programme.desc: An entire flight from Vietnam is suspected of drug smuggling sniffer dog finds a package Two students with little luggage cause suspicion.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: The helicopter crew is faced with a tough decision when one of their own calls for help, On Coast Guard cutter Alex Haley, a small boat team faces a serious situation when they attempt to board a fishing vessel.

programme.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programme.desc: A damage vessel goes drifting across the Bering Sea an injured man needs to be hoisted off a freighter three hunters go stranded how to stay alive in the Alaskan landscape.

programme.title: Customs: Sniffer Dogs Score
programme.desc: A smuggler has no choice but to give himself away when the sniffer dog catches on.
